For almost 20 years, the company has specialized in the use of various techniques for a broad range of industrial components. Our services include 2D, 2.5D and 3D (CT) X-Ray techniques, 3D laser scanning, ultrasonic and eddy current testing or dye penetrant inspection. Especially X-ray computed tomography (CT) has been established as an inspection technique in a broad range of industry branches. The ability of a non-destructive inspection tremendously supports the quality of solid materials or industrial products, for instance, automotive parts, by providing comprehensive information about shape, dimensions, volumes, internal defects or the spatial distribution of inclusions or voids in 3D. Apart from its non-destructive nature, CT has emerged as a very fast and efficient technique, which can be even attached to in-line manufacturing or testing. We create best-in-class technologies for Smart Vision systems, Smart Manufacturing systems, and Smart Connectivity systems. | TKH provides telecom, building, and industrial solutions. | TKH Group N.V. provides telecom, building, and industrial solutions based on system concepts, products, and related services in Europe, the United States, and Asia. Its Telecom Solutions segment develops, produces, and supplies outdoor infrastructure for telecom and CATV networks, and indoor home networking applications. This segment offers indoor telecom systems, such as home networking, broadband connectivity, power plug systems, and IPTV-solutions; fiber network systems; and copper network systems. The Telecom Solutions segment serves telecom and cable operators, service providers, telecom installers, telecom retailers, and housing association markets. The company's Building Solutions segment provides solutions in the field of electro-technology for the care and security sectors. This segment's product line includes building technologies comprising structured plug and play cable systems, light and light switch systems, video communication, and information systems; security systems, such as systems for CCTV, video/audio-analysis and detection, intercom, access control, central control rooms, and retail security; and connectivity systems, such as specialty cable systems for shipbuilding, railways, infrastructure, and energy markets. The Building Solutions segment serves utility, government, traffic infrastructure, care institutions, parking organization, marine and offshore, energy companies, and rail markets. | TKH Group N.V. engages un the automation and electrification business. in the Netherlands, rest of Europe, Asia, North America, and internationally. The Smart Vision Systems segment provides 2D and 3D machine vision technology systems used to enhance quality inspection, operation, and object monitoring; and security vision systems that enable customers to manage and control the urban environment, as well as enhances efficiency, safety, and security in various markets, such as infrastructure, parking, and building security. The Smart Manufacturing Systems segment offers systems engineering and assembly, control and analysis software, and connectivity and vision technologies to car and truck tire production, and factory automation industries; and care solutions, including medicine distribution machines. The Smart Connectivity Systems segment develops connectivity systems for on-shore and off-shore energy distribution; fiber optic connectivity systems for data and communication networks; and specialized cable systems for various industrial automation applications, such as the industrial, marine and offshore, and medical sectors, as well as provides contactless energy and data distribution comprising hardware components and intelligent software for airfield ground lighting systems. The company was formerly known as NV Twentsche Kabel Holding and changed its name to TKH Group N.V. in 2005. companies.name: SR Control
companies.shortDescription:
SR Control provides quality assurance and inspection services for precision parts and assemblies. The company offers dimensional measurement using computed tomography and 3D coordinate measuring machines, as well as contour analyses with surface measuring equipment. Its services include initial sample inspection reports, laser engraving and marking, and visual surface inspection using magnifiers or microscopes. SR Control also performs deburring, rework, and cleaning of various components. In addition, the company handles assembly and final inspection of assemblies and individual parts, as well as sorting and packaging tasks. It conducts 100 percent manual inspection of precision parts based on defined defect criteria for industrial customers. || Unser Unternehmen steht seit 2005 für Qualitätskontrolle auf höchstem Niveau. Unsere Leistungen bedeuten für Sie Gewissheit in Qualität und Kostenersparnis - für Ihre Kunden Zufriedenheit mit Ihrem Produkt.
Wir bieten Vermessungen  mit verschiedenen Koordinatenmessgeräten, Vermessungen und Materialprüfungen mittels Computertomographie (CT) und Lasermarkierungen für Serienteile (QR Codes, DTMX Codes, Seriennummern, etc.) | SR Control provides quality assurance services including precision part inspection, measurement, rework, assembly, and packaging. | SR Control provides quality assurance and inspection services for precision parts and assemblies. The company offers dimensional measurement using computed tomography and 3D coordinate measuring machines, as well as contour analyses with surface measuring equipment. Its services include initial sample inspection reports, laser engraving and marking, and visual surface inspection using magnifiers or microscopes. SR Control also performs deburring, rework, and cleaning of various components. In addition, the company handles assembly and final inspection of assemblies and individual parts, as well as sorting and packaging tasks. It conducts 100 percent manual inspection of precision parts based on defined defect criteria for industrial customers.

companies.name: Supratec Engineering
companies.shortDescription:
SUPRATEC Engineering is the flagship brand for engineering at SUPRATEC*.

It gathers under a single banner the activities SUPRATEC Lormac (design and production of assembly equipment and specific tools), SUPRATEC Synergies (design and development of technological disruptions) and SUPRATEC Evo (adaptive processes and hi-tech systems for automation and control purposes).

This is achieved by the creation of the eFactory® portfolio: Library of integrated and connected technology lines for the continuous improvement of the Industry 4.0 production processes. In the Preparation, Handling, Assembly and Control of parts phase, our technologies are adapted to the entire industrial manufacturing chain. Expertise includes adaptive dispensing of complex materials, adaptive polishing, autonomous handling of heavy loads, ergonomic positioning, bin picking of components, precision clamping, automatic screwing, press-fitting assembly, confocal measurement, 2D/3D vision inspection, and so on.

Our Ile-de-France (Bondoufle, Design Office), Rhône-Alpes (Lyon, Industrial IT) and Lorraine (Tucquegnieux, Design Office and Production Unit) locations facilitate local exchanges with the French industrial network. 

By combining industrial, IT and technological resources, our multidisciplinary teams put their know-how at the service of the aeronautics, automotive, space, defence, rail, naval and construction sectors... We offer our customers high value-added solutions adapted to their challenges in improving their manufacturing performance. Our range of services covers the design and assembly of cutting-edge technologies, the industrialization of new products, the integration of \'turnkey\'​ solutions including delivery, installation and maintenance on site.

*SUPRATEC, an SME established for more than 50 years in Ile-de-France and the provinces, generates 55M€ in turnover in France and abroad, based on two business lines: engineering and technical trading. || SUPRATEC Engineering is the flagship brand for engineering at SUPRATEC*.

Sytec Group offers turnkey solutions for industrial automation, assembly machines, test benches and software applications, highly integrated with production processes.


AUTOMATIC ASSEMBLY STATIONS AND LINES

- Components assembly lines made according to customer needs and product characteristics
- Process flow completely controlled with SyWorkflow software, ensuring the quality of the goods
- Evaluation of the necessary automation carried out in collaboration with the customer, to ensure the right balance between efficiency and costs

BENCHES AND TESTING EQUIPMENTS

- Realization of automatic testing systems, end of line or integrated into the production process
- Strong specific experiences for different kinds of products, tested with SyTest software, developed to ensure whole control of the test sequence to the customer

TOTAL INTEGRATION WITH COMPANY ERP / MES 

- Availability of data collected from assembly lines or test benches within the customer management systems
- Ability to automatically transmit to the specific automatic processes all the information from production planning and production BOM
- SyMover Program to manage the bi-directional flow, a completely customizable program that performs the exchange of information from different systems

VISION SYSTEMS

SyMeasure system, designed to integrate dimensional controls, aesthetic evaluations or presence checks within the production process, reducing the delay time between the production and the verification. companies.name: Demcon industrial systems
companies.shortDescription:
Demcon industrial systems is your partner for production technology. As part of the Demcon group, we develop, create and support technical solutions for the manufacturing industry. Our solutions are modular, scalable and based on state-of-the-art industry standards in combination with innovative concepts. These may range from sub-modules to complete turnkey production lines and include functions like high precision product assembly and quality inspection with industrial vision cameras and algorithms. Together with selected partners and our customers, we define a tailored vision on the theme “Smart Industry” and turn this into tangible technology for your business. Our own motion controller, complete with drives and software, enables us to respond to your positioning challenges with strong and reliable answers.

Demcon industrial systems is an independent part of the Demcon group, consisting of three operating companies with around 60 employees and serving the industrial market. The Demcon Group has access to many (>500) engineering specialists in different disciplines. We like to take on difficult challenges which cannot be solved straight away, but which often need a creative approach with fundamental technical knowledge.

companies.name: Evefall Automation
companies.shortDescription: A vision inspection system (machine vision) is an automated and cost-effective way to ensure that the products in a manufacturing facility meet given specifications and quality requirements. companies.name: Deltaray
companies.shortDescription:
Deltaray is a machine manufacturing company that provides turnkey inspection solutions. || Deltaray is a machine manufacturing company that provides turnkey inspection solutions. | Deltaray is a new High-Tech company in the field of Quality Inspection Automation located in Belgium using Xray. 
Our disruptive 3D X-ray scanning technology 3DAX (patented, TM) provides fully automated quality inspection for large batches or 100% in-line inspection of mission-critical parts on the production floor. The 3DAX approach uses the part CAD model as a digital twin, part pose-automation, and AI for reliable quality analytics. It provides fully automated inspection at 5-25 µm precision, 100x faster than existing X-ray quality inspection solutions used today.

We offer turnkey inspection solutions as the missing link to zero defect industry leaders in their Industry 4.0 approach. A daily challenge of zero defect manufacturers is to assure quality for their customers. Closing the gap between increasing parts complexity and current inspection capabilities puts pressure on companies’ profitability. Assuring the quality of products is a crucial activity for every manufacturer. Just increasing the sample rate or adding 100% inspection by human eyes is not solving the problem.
Although visual camera inspection is widely adopted in such production environments, there is a big solution gap for fully automated inspection of the internals of products at line-speed. 

In contrast to visual inspection, X-ray imaging allows to penetrate objects and is therefore unique in its capability to visually check internal geometry and assembly correctness of industrial products. Our 3DAX - 3D Accelerated Xray technology is fully automated inspection solution of the internals of products at line-speed enabling up to 100% inspection of all parts produced. | Precision CNC manufacturing. | Delta-Ray Industries Inc manufactures precision components. The Company provides high speed production machining, CNC turning and milling, anodizing, painting, coating, plating, heat treating, welding, and raw material testing services. Delta-Ray Industries serves aerospace, military, oil, and commercial industries in the United States. | Aircraft Parts/Auxiliary Equipment Nec

UTPVision is a manufacturing company that produces vision inspection systems for rubber and plastic parts. || UTPVision is a manufacturing company that produces vision inspection systems for rubber and plastic parts. | UTPVision is a leading provider of turnkey vision inspection systems for rubber and plastic parts. With a long experience in a variety of industries, UTPVision can develop solutions for virtually any application, precisely tailored to your needs.

Our cutting-edge inspection tools leverage machine vision algorithms, AI technology and patented multi-color illumination to quickly and reliably sort parts even at very high speed.

The modular design makes it easy to optimally configure each machine for the requested inspection tasks: UTPVision inspection stations integrate best-in-class optical, electronical and mechanical components for superior performance.

UTPVision was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Bergamo, Italy, with subsidiaries in the US and China. All systems are completely designed and manufactured at our R&D and production sites in Italy and distributed worldwide through a broad sales and service network.

companies.name: Delft Robotics
companies.shortDescription:
Delft Robotics wants to make accessible robotic solutions for each task for each company by delivering turnkey systems. || Delft Robotics develops intelligent robotic systems to measure. | Delft Robotics wants to make accessible robotic solutions for each task for each company by delivering turnkey systems. | Delft Robotics started in 2014 as a spin-off of the European Union sponsored project 'Factory in a Day'. The project Factory-in-a-day aims to improve the competitiveness of European manufacturing SMEs by removing the primary obstacles for robot automation: installation time and installation cost. Due to the very positive feedback and large interest from the commercial sector, prof. dr. Martijn Wisse and Arie van den Ende kickstarted Delft Robotics. 
We aim to make more automation solutions accessible for small and medium sized production companies. With the use of industrial robotic arms and 3D vision solutions, highly flexible systems can be created with minimal development time. This allows for automation of repetitive and laborious production tasks which could previously only be performed by human employees.
Currently, Delft Robotics houses seven engineers - boasting expertise in robotic control, mechanical design, computer vision, artificial intelligence, system integration and human machine interaction. This team of engineers analyses new challenges, advises customers in next steps of automation, and develops and installs turnkey automation systems. Our close relation to the Delft University of Technology allows us to cooperate in the development of new technologies, and to use the new academic developments in the systems we deliver to our clients. Delft Robotics actively makes use of - and contributes to - the open source community for its products.

Its flagship platform, ReliVision, enables organizations to program perception itself—using GenAI to generate synthetic defects, adapt inspection logic and continuously evolve vision systems as products, environments and requirements change. Designed as inspection-native software, ReliVision transforms quality inspection into software-defined intelligence with built-in traceability, auditability, allowing vision systems to be deployed, reused and refined across products, lines, and sites. Relimetrics helps industrial teams move beyond static AI models toward vision systems that learn, adapt, and operate reliably in real-world conditions. Relimetrics operates in Sunnyvale, California, and Berlin, Germany. | Relimetrics, Inc. provides software solutions. The Company offers computer vision and machine learning software used for quality audit, process control and predictive maintenance. Relimetrics serves customers in the United States and Germany. | Relimetrics is hardware-agnostic platform software using computer vision and machine learning to track subtle changes between images (or video frames). It can monitor change in all kinds of materials with sub-pixel resolution, giving information on displacements, strains and potential material issues (e.g. defects) in near real-time and over time. As opposed to other computer vision systems used… · More to evaluate mechanical reliability, it is low-cost, easy to use, IoT-connected, mobile, cloud-based, provides automated assessment, and can detect the natural pattern of materials (as opposed to requiring application of a pattern which is needed for other image correlation technologies today). Fort de ses partenariats avec des leaders industriels mondiaux, VISIOSHAPE devient un acteur innovant dans le développement de procédés industriels assistés par vision 3D. Nous innovons sur la robotisation des procédés industriels en intégrant sur les machines des cerveaux (intelligence) et des yeux (systèmes de vision) pour qu'elles puissent agir en environnement aléatoire et s'autoprogrammer en temps réel. L’atout de VISIOSHAPE est la reconnaissance de tous types de formes 3D et la génération de trajectoires précises et temps réel et sans se soucier des plans théoriques des pièces. Nous répondons ainsi à des verrous rencontrées dans des applications nécessitant une adaptation en temps réel aux formes des pièces. VISIOSHAPE est basé dans le quartier créatif manufacture à Saint-Étienne, au cœur de la cité du design. En lien avec un écosystème orienté vers l’industrie 4.0 et l’innovation. companies.name: FORT Endoscope
companies.shortDescription:
Combining the French expertise and the German quality, FORT is a dynamic SME, subsidiary of the viZaar group. Created in 1972, FORT has become an expert in industrial endoscopy, reaching a wide variety of sectors such as nuclear, aeronautics, railway, military and automotive.
We offer a remote visual inspection system which is very well adapted to the non-destructive testing requirement of the industry, from simple products such as lighting cables or the high-end products  such as the long range videoscope VUMAN E3, including the portable and autonomous videoscope VUCAM. 
FORT delivers most of its products in Europe (France, Germany, United Kingdom etc.) but it also experienced a relative success reaching the global market of United States, Russia and India. 
Why choose us? As a SME, our responsiveness is no longer to be proved. We will meet all your inspection needs with our wide range and above all our products are customizable. Need to add a length or an optical adjustment in a short time and at a lower cost? We can respond favourably with our design offices. || Combining the French expertise and the German quality, FORT is a dynamic SME, subsidiary of the viZaar group. Rudolf Fritz offers complete services in the production of low-voltage and control systems, measurement and testing technology, drive and conveyor technology, high-voltage switchgear, and test bench systems. In addition, Rudolf Fritz specializes in the repair of electrical and electromechanical aircraft components. Rudolf Fritz GmbH is represented in Koblenz with the traditional branch ''Elektro Thomas'' and in Bad Lobenstein with the branch ''salo Schaltanlagen''. With around 680 employees, Rudolf Fritz GmbH is one of the medium-sized companies in the field of electrical engineering. || Rudolf Fritz | Rudolf Fritz is a Construction company that provides aviation technology, measurement & testing technology, and conveyor technology. | Rudolf Fritz offers complete services in the production of low-voltage and control systems, measurement and testing technology, drive and conveyor technology, high-voltage switchgear, and test bench systems. The Platform can process input signals in the form of images to automatically detect defects and extract relevant attributes such as position and size. 
The Platform utilizes many traditional computer vision concepts and modern Machine Learning methods, such as Convolutional Neural Networks. The combination of these technologies allows the NDicate to reliably perform pattern recognition tasks such as defect detection and classification and fast, accurate, and consistent reports of defect size, shape, and intensity. Another benefit of the Platform is that it can learn to solve new problems by training on datasets previously assessed by experts. This ability to learn by example allows the NDicate to adapt and automate new applications requiring human effort and specific expertise. 
Implementing NDicate Software reduces the analysis time and, more importantly, increases the consistency and accuracy of results. Welcome to the world of BReact
Custom-Made AI SolutionS
Contact Us
ABout Breact
BReact is an IT Start-Up based in Vienna, Austria that specializes in automating manual processes using artificial intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), Computer Vision (CV) and Large Language Models (LLM). We provide a cutting-edge platform that facilitates the implementation of divers use cases for real world applications. We strive to improve our software to address the requirements of every customer, as well as deliver a professional advisory service regarding AI Strategies.
Our goal is to guide our customers throughout the entire implementation lifecycle of an AI Solution. BReact offers everything from the initial concept and consulting, to the design and implementation of your AI Application. We want to assist your corporation in identifying key ways the technology can be used to innovate the way your company operates today, preparing you for the challenges that await tomorrow and allow you to focus on growing your core business.
We harness the power of Large Language Models to streamline and automate a wide range of business processes. By integrating these advanced AI technologies, we enable companies to enhance efficiency, reduce manual errors, and unlock innovative solutions across various domains such as document verification, knowledge management, personalized customer experiences, and secure on-premise implementations. Our approach focuses on leveraging LLMs to interpret and analyze large datasets, automate routine tasks, and provide insights, thereby driving productivity and fostering a smarter, more agile business environment.
LLM Use Cases
We utilize Computer Vision technology to transform the way businesses interact with the visual world. By enabling machines to accurately interpret and respond to visual data, we automate tasks that require visual recognition such as quality inspection, inventory management, or pose position. This not only enhances operational efficiency but also opens new avenues for innovation, allowing businesses to leverage visual data in ways previously unimaginable, driving growth and competitive advantage in their respective industries.

BCB Informática y Control is a Spanish engineering company founded in Madrid in 1996, specialized in system integration in the fields of communications, automatic test equipment (ATEs), machine vision, industrial automation, instrumentation and data acquisition systems. Focusing on electronic systems, BCB is specialized in IT (mainly, phone and multimedia systems) and in automotive industries (CAN/ LIN buses, clusters, multimedia, durability tests, etc.). Also, BCB has worked in  R&D European (FP5 and FP7) and Spanish projects. Unser Team verfügt über eine breitbandige Erfahrung mit dedizierten Ansprechpartnern.

Breweries and wineries of all sizes around the world have now chosen to replace the time-consuming and human error - prone standard method (yeast cell count using haemocytometer) with Oculyze, a far more reliable, fast, and cost-saving solution for monitoring fermentation during all the stages of the production process.  While working on constantly improving its flagship products, Oculyze also focuses on bringing the advantages of cloud-based image recognition, like faster development time, lower cost and better image recognition to other applications such as ethanol and bioethanol (or ethanol fuel) production, blood or sperm counts, parasite detection in feces, asbestos fiber detection, emulsion analysis, and bacteria detection, thereby continuing to add applications to its cloud-based image recognition platform.   Oculyze can offer turnkey solutions to businesses, integrating three essential components – the image analysis platform (for data storage & backup, user authentication, and task handling), a custom image analysis & recognition software and the image capture software developed by Oculyze. Alternatively, owing to the open nature of Oculyze’s API, its image recognition software can be fully integrated into existing software, improving on the solutions that already work. | Oculyze developed a hand-held microscope with high magnification (~400X), it allows visualization of objects |10µm. All images are processed and saved in the cloud. companies.shortDescription:
Funded by the European Union with €7.9 million under the Horizon Europe programme, the BERTHA project aims to develop a scalable and probabilistic Driver Behavioural Model (DBM) mostly based on the Bayesian Belief Network.

The DBM will be implemented on an open-source, HUB (repository) to validate the technological and practical feasibility of the solution with the industry and become a unique approach for the model's worldwide scalability. 

The resulting DBM will be translated into a simulating platform, CARLA, using diverse demos which allow the building of new driving models in the platform.

BERTHA will also include a methodology which, due to the HUB, will share the model with the scientific community to ease its growth.

The project includes a set of interrelated demonstrators to show this DBM approach as a reference to design human-like, easily predictable and acceptable behaviour of automated driving functions in mixed traffic scenarios.

The BERTHA consortium is formed by 14 partners from 6 different countries, coordinated by Instituto de Biomecánica de Valencia (IBV) (ES). The other partners are Institut Vedecom (FR), Université Gustave Eiffel (FR), German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence (DE), Computer Vision Center (ES), Altran Deutschland (DE), Continental Engineering Services (FR), CIDAUT Foundation (ES), Austrian Institute of Technology (AT), Universitat de València (ES), Europcar International (FR), FI Group (PT), Panasonic Automotive Systems Europe (DE) and the Korea Transport Institute (KOTI).

________________________
Funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the European Climate, Infrastructure and Environment Executive Agency (CINEA). companies.shortDescription:
Defensya is a R&D technology company that specializes in defense and aerospace consultancy and engineering services. || Defensya is a R&D technology company that specializes in defense and aerospace consultancy and engineering services. | Vision Systems Specialists

DEFENSYA is an innovative technological company founded in July 2001, highly interested in innovation, design, art of inventing and making things right. Research and development are our key elements in business.

We specialize in Defence and Aerospace consultancy and engineering services and particularly all aspects of a vision system (avionics): We develop and manufacture items such as video monitors, image, audio and data management systems (including compression, decompression, encryption, decryption and storage for multiple channels synchronously), lighting (LED and laser-based high power) and special cameras.

With an impressive patents record (more than twenty patented inventions) in Defense, industrial and civil areas and more than ten years working directly with Airbus Military, all our products are designed, developed and manufactured  to improve previous solutions at reasonable prizes.

companies.name: Muller Technology
companies.shortDescription:
Muller Technology provides automation and tooling solutions for various industries. The company develops systems such as in-mold labeling automation, takeout automation, thermoforming equipment, and robotic stackers. Its portfolio also includes vision inspection systems, case packing and palletizing machines, mobile automation, and turnkey mold solutions. Muller Technology supports clients across sectors including food and beverage, medical devices, health and personal care, semiconductors, and industrial production. In addition to equipment, the company offers consulting, pilot phase support, training, and aftermarket services. Its solutions focus on optimizing production processes, ensuring consistent product quality, and enabling flexible manufacturing. By combining engineering expertise with automation, Muller Technology helps businesses improve operational efficiency and adapt to evolving market requirements. || Automation Equipment in Fort Collins, CO. | Muller Technology specializes in mold making and automation technology for thin-wall plastic packaging development. | Muller Technology provides automation and tooling solutions for various industries. The company develops systems such as in-mold labeling automation, takeout automation, thermoforming equipment, and robotic stackers. Its portfolio also includes vision inspection systems, case packing and palletizing machines, mobile automation, and turnkey mold solutions. Muller Technology supports clients across sectors including food and beverage, medical devices, health and personal care, semiconductors, and industrial production. In addition to equipment, the company offers consulting, pilot phase support, training, and aftermarket services. Its solutions focus on optimizing production processes, ensuring consistent product quality, and enabling flexible manufacturing. By combining engineering expertise with automation, Muller Technology helps businesses improve operational efficiency and adapt to evolving market requirements. | World Leading Automation Systems for Thin Wall Packaging of Food, Consumer Goods, Personal Care and other applications - combines with mold know-how and fully established production sites in America and Switzerland. 

Muller Technology is made up by two divisions: Industrial Automation and Injection Molds.

The Industrial Automation division offers state-of-the-art automation and advanced robotics solutions to various industries to enhance productivity and efficiency. MULLER designs and makes manufacturing production lines using dynamic and innovative Industry 4.0 technologies like Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs), Collaborative Robots (Cobots), Robot Arms (6-axis, SCARA), Vision Systems and Digital Twins.

The Injection Mold-making division provides high-precision solutions in the area of In-Mold Labelling and Injection-Compression molding to meet the unique needs of each customer. MULLER focuses on environmental footprint reduction and Sustainability through light-weighting of packaging solutions, and substitution of plastics with renewable materials.
 
Our team of experts works closely with clients to understand their challenges and develop tailored solutions that improve productivity and increase competitiveness. 

Both divisions work together to ensure that the company stays ahead of the curve, delivering innovative products and services that set the standard for their industries. Customers include manufacturers of complex components, and brand owners in the food, pharma, medical, and personal care industry. 

With operations in southern Switzerland and Colorado, USA, the company has a strong global presence and is well-positioned to serve clients around the world. With a commitment to continuous improvement and a focus on customer satisfaction, MULLER Technology is at the forefront of the industrial automation and robotics industry, driving innovation and providing solutions for a better future. | MULLER Technology is a dynamic and innovative company with two divisions, Industrial Automation and Injection Molds. companies.name: 4JET
companies.shortDescription:
The 4JET Group combines two highly innovative companies under one roof: 4JET Technologies GmbH specializes in laser systems for cleaning, ablation, and modification of delicate technical surfaces. Key products include machines for cleaning of automotive parts and tire molds, tire marking and bonding preparation. Customers include virtually all leading tire makers and numerous automotive suppliers and OEMs. 4JET microtech GmbH specializes in micromachining solutions for cutting and drilling of brittle materials such as glass, as well as solutions for thin-film ablation. Our unique process technologies such as the PearlCut glass cutting process or our LEAF technology for micronscale surface modification target the speciality glass, display and PV industry. Established in 2006 we now employ a team of about 150 experts in our headquarter in Alsdorf (Germany), Prutting near Rosenheim (Germany) the US, and China. Our international customer base in over 40 countries is being supported by a network of subsidiary offices and agencies for sales and technical service. See www.4jet.de for more information. || The 4JET Group combines two highly innovative companies under one roof: 4JET Technologies GmbH specializes in laser systems for cleaning, ablation, and modification of delicate technical surfaces. Key products include machines for cleaning of automotive parts and tire molds, tire marking and bonding preparation. Customers include virtually all leading tire makers and numerous automotive suppliers and OEMs. 4JET microtech GmbH specializes in micromachining solutions for cutting and drilling of brittle materials such as glass, as well as solutions for thin-film ablation. Our unique process technologies such as the PearlCut glass cutting process or our LEAF technology for micronscale surface modification target the speciality glass, display and PV industry. Established in 2006 we now employ a team of about 150 experts in our headquarter in Alsdorf (Germany), Prutting near Rosenheim (Germany) the US, and China. Our international customer base in over 40 countries is being supported by a network of subsidiary offices and agencies for sales and technical service. See www.4jet.de for more information. | Our Mission? Perfect Surfaces  

We combine laser process technology, software, machine vision, automation and peripherals with turnkey-installation and lifecycle support for maintenance, repair and upgrades. We enable mission-critical high volume production of next generation consumer devices, automotive parts, solar cells or medical devices.  
We work for the category leaders in our niches. Our customers include virtually all leading manufacturers of technical glass, tires and numerous Fortune 500 companies from automotive suppliers and OEMs.
We have a deep understanding of micromachining solutions for cutting and drilling of brittle materials such as glass or semiconductors, as well as solutions for thin-film ablation and cleaning. 
Established in 2006 we now employ a team of about 250 experts in our headquarter in Alsdorf (Germany), Krailling (near Munich, Germany) as well as satellite offices and service hubs in the US, China and Taiwan. Our international customer base in over 40 countries is being supported by a network of subsidiary offices and agencies for sales and technical service.

See www.4jet.de for more information. | 4JET Technologies specializes in laser systems for cleaning, ablation, and modification of delicate technical surfaces. | 4JET is a manufacturer of laser systems for the treatment of technical surfaces. Since its founding in 2006, the company has quickly become the leading manufacturer of laser systems for the edge deletion of thin-film solar cells and the labeling of tires. The company also supplies laser systems for other industrial cleaning tasks and produces pulsed CO2 lasers for surface treatment. Since 2007, 4JET has been cooperating with Mitsubishi International GmbH, a subsidiary of Mitsubishi Corporation (Tokyo), in worldwide sales. At the Hückelhoven site, a team of physicists and engineers is working on both the development of laser process technology and the integration of processes into turnkey production plants for industrial use.

companies.name: SOLMET-7
companies.shortDescription:
Solmet-7 was founded in 2006 to provide solutions for mechanisation and welding for mass-produced parts in the automotive industry. Later on, thanks to the team’s extensive experience, a market study was carried out and the company management decided to expand the business portfolio to include a department to design (mechanical engineering) manufacture, assemble and commission machinery (turnkey) and tools for industry.

Made up of a team of experienced professionals, Solmet-7, S.L. Produces tailor-made solutions for assembly processes, including flexible manufacturing systems for pallets and stand alone stations, assembly and production lines that use robotic vision systems, rotary machinery for welding stations (MIG-MAG, resistance, etc.) and handling (pick and place, elevators, conveyors, etc.).
We also offer more specific and complex products such as “Test Machinery”, which ensures that the final product sent to the client meets the technical requirements in terms of size and resistance, etc., and includes: 

•	Leak detection equipment.
•	Fatigue testing equipment.
•	Dimensional inspection equipment.

Over the last 10 years we formed a network of partners who worked with us and advised us on mechanical, computer and/or programming projects, in order to offer the best possible solution for our clients’ needs. These tasks are centralised through our Engineering department, which coordinates, manages and controls all the phases of each project to ensure that they meet the client’s specifications.

We have a Production Plant located in the Santa Anna industrial area in Santpedor (Barcelona), which has 200 m2 of engineering offices and an assembly plant of 1000 m2 with two crane bridges to help assemble the machinery. || Solmet-7 was founded in 2006 to provide solutions for mechanisation and welding for mass-produced parts in the automotive industry. companies.name: YXLON International
companies.shortDescription:
Comet Yxlon GmbH develops x-ray and CT system solutions. The Company creates inspection systems for all types of cast parts, new materials, electronic components, batteries, and welded joints. Comet Yxlon caters to semiconductors, electronics, automotive, additive manufacturing, and aerospace industries worldwide. || Led by experience. Driven by curiosity.

Good solutions start with good questions. At Comet Yxlon, our curiosity and passion for technology are the drivers behind our collaborative approach in product development. Based on customer feedback, we develop high-end X-ray and CT system solutions that enable non-destructive testing in the semiconductor/electronics, automotive and aerospace industries - from R&D labs to production settings.

With our headquarters in Hamburg, sales and service locations inSan Jose (California), Yokohama, Shanghai, Hsinshu (Taiwan) and Suwon (Korea), as well as a network of representatives in over 50 countries, Comet Yxlon serves customers locally - all over the world.

Pioneering spirit meets decades of experience.

Innovation is an old tradition at Comet Yxlon. Our roots go back to the discovery of X-rays by Wilhelm Conrad Röntgen in 1895 and the construction of the first X-ray tube by Carl Heinrich Florenz Müller in Hamburg in 1896. Their legacy still inspires us today in our effort to develop cutting-edge inspection solutions that create sustainable progress.

Part of Comet.

We’re proud to be part of Comet, the globally leading Swiss technology company with a focus on plasma control and X-ray technology. 
We benefit from their prime market position, financial strength and many support functions. The close, but independent cooperation between our divisions helps reduce complexity and increase development times. | YXLON International is the leading provider of X-ray inspection equipment for industrial applications. | YXLON International is the leading provider of X-ray inspection equipment for industrial applications. Whether operated manually, semi-automatically or on a fully automatic scale, they have the right solution to match nearly every application. For us, the highest priority is placed on quality: the quality of their inspection systems and, as a result, the quality of your products. Their years of experience and the pleasure they take in innovation have enabled us to gain the confidence and trust of the most renowned manufacturers in the automotive industry, aviation and aerospace, shipbuilding and vessel construction, electronics and other industrial sectors. | Led by experience. companies.name: Nommas
companies.shortDescription:
We serve as a professional vision solution provider for smart manufacturing to promote automation towards industry 4.0. In the first stage, our priority is to help diversify the kingdom's economy by promoting automation for 7000+ industrial manufacturers of 20+ key categories.  Based on our decent research experience, we use advanced computer vision and machine learning technologies to identify and understand visual features generated in manufacturing production lines and to further automate the operations into a degree much faster, cheaper, and more accurate than labor. Through this approach, a smart solution is designed to promote automation in real-time inspection, quality control, sorting, robotic guidance, and integrated monitoring/analytics, which used to be carried out and observed only by human. With the developments of new techniques in computer vision and machine learning, we are committed to break the technical barriers in this area and to bring new possibilities that are not previously feasible.  We developed a modular system (hardware & software) to be customized and installed for various production scenarios. The hardware (industrial camera module, lighting module, mechanical module) is designed with portable modules, and the software (user interface)/ algorithm (feature recognition and understanding) is based on a neural network trained by samples collected from realistic operations. This makes our product self-adjustable and highly flexible to fit various production line scenarios.  We help the manufacturers largely improve production efficiency and reduce economic losses, and substantially enhance the grade and reputation by reducing the occurrence of defects and minimizing customer complaint. || We don’t just write software. We co-design the hardware, the AI, and the infrastructure that runs it - then deploy it where it matters most: the factory floor.

Nommas.ai builds full-stack industrial intelligence. Our own edge computing platform runs our own AI models, processing data in real time, on-site, with no cloud dependency. 

From predictive maintenance to quality inspection, safety monitoring to energy optimization - every product runs on hardware and software we designed together, as one system.

This isn’t AI bolted onto legacy systems. This is AI engineered from chip to cloud - purpose-built for heavy industry.

Headquartered in Riyadh.
